blockers.description: Sandbox server process dies between tool calls — cannot do browser testing
blockers.workaround: Test on Vercel instead. Add ZAI_API_KEY env var to Vercel project.

blockers.description: Frontend deepAnalyze() doesn't send scenario param to backend
blockers.workaround: Backend defaults to 'prompt' scenario. Fix in 3.4.

knownIssues: Sandbox: background processes from bash tool don't survive between tool calls
Sandbox: start.sh runs dev.sh but process may be killed by sandbox cleanup
Vercel: Z.ai SDK unavailable — needs ZAI_API_KEY in environment variables
QA: deepAnalyze frontend doesn't pass scenario to backend (minor, defaults to prompt)

gates.epicGate: npx tsc --noEmit && bun run build && bunx verify-docs --ci
